1.content:
It all happened in a blur. One second you were walking down a back alley of flee bottom in Kings Landing, when you heard a scream. You turn a corner and look down a back alley to see two Lannister soldiers harassing a young boy. As you looked on you considered simply ignoring the whole situation in order to avoid unwanted trouble. But just as you turned to walk away you were stopped when the boy spat in one of the Lannister soldiers faces. This infuriated the soldiers, who began to beat the poor boy mercilessly, smashing down at the boy with their fists and legs. Upon seeing this you decide that you needed to interfere in order to prevent the soldiers from killing the boy.

As such you run at the soldiers and manage to tackle both of the men to the ground. You screamed at the boy to run away, which he did to the best of his ability, while you focused on drawing the attention of the Lannister soldiers. Hurling insult after insult at the soldiers until their attention was dead set on you. One of the soldiers charged at you with his sword, but you avoided his attack and began to look for a route of escape. As you make a break you it, one of the soldiers tackles you to the ground, as you struggled to get the solider off of you, his partner caught up to you and pierced you in the neck with his sword. Your eyes bulge as darkness consumes your vision.

You floated in darkness for what felt like a long time. During that time you contemplated your life. You were born in flee bottom, the son of a prostitute and some Baratheon solider who sacked king’s landing during Roberts Rebellion. Growing up was hard, you were so poor and your mother didn’t make enough money to support you. As a result you had to survive any way you could, so you decided to become a pick pocket, theft, con artist, and any other way of getting money. At the age of ten your mother died of disease and you were left all alone, as a result you have struggled to survive over many years. Over all of those years on your own, you observed how the powerful ruled with no regard to the common people wellbeing. It was all about their ridiculous power games, which in the under only hurt the people more. During your life you prayed for change to happen, for som miracle that could change the world.

Just as you accepted your fate to seemingly be consumed by the darkness a voice called out to you. You looked around the darkness in surprise, then a raging flame appeared in front of you. Your mind was ablaze with questions and fear as you wondered what the intentions of this thing was. The voice spoke again and said “do not be afraid. I mean you no harm. In fact I’m here to give you a second chance.” You are stunned by the statement and ask “why me?” The fire answer “for change. I have watched over this world since it’s inception, it was beautiful and peaceful once, but now all I see is suffering and strife. You desire change more than anything, so I’ll give you a power which will allow you to reshape society itself. You were dumbfounded by its words, what power? How could you reshape society? The fire seemingly sensing your endless thoughts said “now go. You’ll understand soon enough. And good luck, the world is now in your hands.” Before you could ask more you were sucked through a portal and into a blinding light.
1.title: Joining the game

11.content:
As your eyes adjust to the light you realize that you’re back in the alley, where the Lannister soldiers had stabbed you. As you looked down your eyes widen to see that your hand was now transparent. This also seemed to be the case for your whole body as well, with your whole body now being see through. As you stumbled around trying to calm down you seemingly phased through the wall of a building, which inside contained a young woman having sex was an older man. As you started at the sight you realized two things, with the first being that you could phase through solid objects and the second being that other people couldn’t see you. You slowly walked back through the wall and into the alley, only to notice the two Lannister soldiers from earlier standing over your deceased body. As you got closer you noticed that one of the soldiers was pissing on your body, while chuckling with his companion.

Infuriated you ran toward one of the soldiers to try and attack him, only for your arm to sink into his body and your vision to go black. As you came too, you looked around in surprised and noticed that the peeing Lannister solider was now to the left of you finishing his business. Confused you looked down and noticed that your hands were not transparent, but real hands. You also noticed that you were now wearing the armor of the Lannister’s. Suddenly you think about to the words that the entity spoke earlier about giving you a power, ‘did he mean this ability? The ability to possess different people's bodies?!’

Despite, the thoughts raging in your head, you were overcome with a desire to get revenge against your murderers. As you looked over to the other Lannister solider pulling his dick back into his pants, a dark smile appeared on your face. “Say, what’s your name again?” You ask the other solider as confusion seeped onto his face. “what are you stupid, we’re have known each other for weeks, Isaac.” You raise your hands defensively and say “humor me.” He gives you an odd look before saying “Hector.” You smile again and laugh saying “was that so bad.” Isaac let out a fake laugh as he turned his back to you and started to walk away, but when he did you called him back. “What do you —“ Isaac stopped as he felt the sword enter his abdomen. You chuckled as you pull the sword out and he falls dead. “Goodbye Hector” you say. Then you put your own sword on your stomach and fall forward. As this happens you quickly jump out of Isaac’s body before the sword sinks into his stomach.

With both of your attackers now dead and your desire for revenge quenched, you wanted to test out your new powers so more. As it turns out you fuse your legs to create a tail, which allow you fly around at fast speeds. As you overlooked the city, you though about everything that had happened. You barely believed it all, but there was no denying it. As you look over the sky line your sight focused on the red keep and a thought entered your mind. With this power you could be anyone, with that kind of power you can bring about change from the top, along with helping the lives of the people. While also screwing over the elite.

As your mind swirled with the possibilities the next question is what do you do now?
11.title: New World

You decide that you’ll start at the Red Keep, which honestly seems to be the source of all the madness and chaos currently infecting the Seven Kingdoms. Added reason was the fact that you disposed the Lannisters with a passion and the added fact that Joffrey, the little shit, sits on the throne.

As you phase through the gate of the Red Keep you marvel at the size of the castle and it’s beauty. You phase through some walls and enter into the throne room of the castle. When you entered you observed that the room was full of people, with Joffrey sitting smugly on the throne. To his left you observed a beautiful woman with long blonde hair, despite her age she was still extremely appealing. You recognized the women as Cersei Lannister, having recognized her after seeing the royal family parading through the city on occasion. To the right of Jeffery stood an imposing man, with graying blonde hair and a hand pinned to his chest, with the man being the hand of the king Tywin Lannister.

As you floated above the crowd, you noticed others standing behind Joffrey as well, a few you recognized as Tyrion Lannister, Little Finger, Mace Tyrell, and the grand maester. You also noticed two other beautiful women surrounded by handmaidens. One had a pale complexion and beautiful red hair, but seemed bleak and nervous. The other young woman had dark chestnut hair and a sly smirk upon her face, and oozed with confidence and intelligence. You recognized the two women as Sansa Stark and Margaery Tyrell, with Margaret being the future wife of Joffrey.

As you took stock of the players, the meeting was adjourned and people began to level the throne room. As you looked over to the throne you observed that many of main players were going their separate ways. As you thought of potential targets, you would prefer to possess a women as you were a young male, and considering how Joffrey is controlled by Cersei and Margaery, a women is the perfect target.

Who do you pursue?

info.brief_description: After dying, a peasant named Al is given a strange power
info.description: After dying in a car crash, seventeen year old Aaron’s spirit is thrown into the world of “Game of Thrones” with the power to possess others. Will he become a player in the game or simply have fun? That is up to you.
